headline: PTC Expands Onshape With Advanced Cloud-Native MBD Features
summary: PTC launches cloud-native MBD in Onshape, embedding manufacturing data into 3D models to streamline design, boost collaboration and speed production.

headline: 2 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 We Avoid
summary: Wall Street has set ambitious price targets for the stocks in this article. While this suggests attractive upside potential, it’s important to remain skeptical because analysts face institutional pressures that can sometimes lead to overly optimistic forecasts.
